title: U.N. Report Says Israeli Killings of Gaza Children Post-Truce Amount to Genocide
summary_full: Israel’s U.N. mission dismissed the report as a “libelous sham,” and called the investigating commission a “fundamentally flawed mechanism.”
summary_public: Israel’s U.N. mission dismissed the report as a “libelous sham,” and called the investigating commission a “fundamentally flawed mechanism.”
